code:
sequenceDiagram %% Component Interaction - User browsing/searching journey %% Based on actual user flow through the application participant User as 👤 User participant Browser as 🌐 Browser participant NextJS as ⚛️ Next.js App participant ArtworkAPI as 🎨 Artwork API participant PersonAPI as 👥 Person API participant RAGAPI as 🧠 RAG API participant SolrClient as 🔍 Solr Client participant RAGService as 🔄 RAG Service participant ES as 🔍 Elasticsearch participant OpenAI as 🤖 OpenAI participant Mongo as 🍃 MongoDB Note over User, Mongo: User Journey: Search → Browse → Detail → Related → Chat %% 1. Homepage Load User->>Browser: Navigate to homepage Browser->>NextJS: GET /de (or /en) NextJS->>NextJS: Load homepage component NextJS-->>Browser: Homepage with hero section Browser-->>User: Display homepage %% 2. Search Artworks User->>Browser: Enter search query "impressionist" Browser->>NextJS: Search form submission NextJS->>ArtworkAPI: GET /api/de/artworks?q=impressionist&page=1&pageSize=12 ArtworkAPI->>SolrClient: searchArtworks({query: "impressionist", pageSize: 12}) SolrClient->>SolrClient: Build Solr query parameters SolrClient->>SolrClient: Execute search against collection.kunsthaus.ch SolrClient-->>ArtworkAPI: SolrSearchResponse with artworks + facets ArtworkAPI->>ArtworkAPI: Transform Solr results to Artwork models ArtworkAPI-->>NextJS: JSON response with artworks + pagination NextJS->>NextJS: Update artwork grid component NextJS-->>Browser: Render search results Browser-->>User: Display 12 impressionist artworks %% 3. Filter Results User->>Browser: Apply category filter "Painting" Browser->>NextJS: Update search parameters NextJS->>ArtworkAPI: GET /api/de/artworks?q=impressionist&categories=Painting ArtworkAPI->>SolrClient: searchArtworks({query: "impressionist", categories: ["Painting"]}) SolrClient->>SolrClient: Add category filter to query SolrClient-->>ArtworkAPI: Filtered results ArtworkAPI-->>NextJS: Filtered artworks NextJS-->>Browser: Updated results Browser-->>User: Show only paintings %% 4. View Artwork Detail User->>Browser: Click on artwork "Sunflowers" Browser->>NextJS: Navigate to /de/artworks/123 NextJS->>ArtworkAPI: GET /api/de/artworks/123 ArtworkAPI->>SolrClient: getArtworkById("123") SolrClient-->>ArtworkAPI: Artwork details ArtworkAPI-->>NextJS: Complete artwork data NextJS->>NextJS: Load artwork detail page + IIIF viewer NextJS-->>Browser: Artwork detail page Browser-->>User: Show artwork details + high-res image %% 5. View Related Artist User->>Browser: Click on artist "Van Gogh" Browser->>NextJS: Navigate to /de/persons/456 NextJS->>PersonAPI: GET /api/de/persons/456 PersonAPI->>SolrClient: getArtistById("456") SolrClient-->>PersonAPI: Person details PersonAPI-->>NextJS: Person data NextJS->>NextJS: Load person detail page NextJS-->>Browser: Person biography + artworks Browser-->>User: Show Van Gogh's biography + works %% 6. Ask RAG Question User->>Browser: Type question "What technique did Van Gogh use?" Browser->>NextJS: Submit RAG query NextJS->>RAGAPI: POST /api/de/rag/answer/artwork/123
{"q": "What technique did Van Gogh use?", "currentArtwork": {...}} RAGAPI->>RAGService: answerRag({q, lang: "de", currentArtwork: {...}}) Note over RAGService: RAG Processing RAGService->>RAGService: Enhance query + detect language RAGService->>OpenAI: Generate embedding OpenAI-->>RAGService: Embedding vector par Vector Search RAGService->>ES: KNN search with artwork context ES-->>RAGService: Vector results and Lexical Search RAGService->>ES: BM25 search with artwork context ES-->>RAGService: Lexical results end RAGService->>RAGService: Merge results + select context RAGService->>OpenAI: Generate answer with context OpenAI-->>RAGService: Answer with citations RAGService-->>RAGAPI: AnswerResult with citations RAGAPI-->>NextJS: JSON response NextJS->>NextJS: Update chat interface NextJS-->>Browser: Display answer with citations Browser-->>User: "Van Gogh verwendete Ölmalerei-Technik... [1] [2]" %% 7. Follow-up Question User->>Browser: Ask follow-up "When was it painted?" Browser->>NextJS: Submit follow-up NextJS->>RAGAPI: POST /api/de/rag/answer/artwork/123
{"q": "When was it painted?", "history": [...]} RAGAPI->>RAGService: answerRag({q, lang: "de", history: [...]}) RAGService->>RAGService: Process with conversation history RAGService->>OpenAI: Generate answer with context + history OpenAI-->>RAGService: Contextual answer RAGService-->>RAGAPI: AnswerResult RAGAPI-->>NextJS: Follow-up answer NextJS-->>Browser: Display contextual answer Browser-->>User: "Das Gemälde wurde 1888 gemalt... [3]" %% 8. Browse Related Artworks User->>Browser: Click "View all works by Van Gogh" Browser->>NextJS: Navigate to artist's works NextJS->>ArtworkAPI: GET /api/de/artworks?person=456&page=1 ArtworkAPI->>SolrClient: searchArtworks({artistId: 456}) SolrClient-->>ArtworkAPI: All Van Gogh artworks ArtworkAPI-->>NextJS: Artwork list NextJS-->>Browser: Grid of Van Gogh's works Browser-->>User: Show all Van Gogh artworks %% Error Handling alt Search Error SolrClient-->>ArtworkAPI: Error response ArtworkAPI-->>NextJS: 500 Error NextJS-->>Browser: Error message Browser-->>User: "Search temporarily unavailable" end alt RAG Error RAGService-->>RAGAPI: No context found RAGAPI-->>NextJS: Empty response NextJS-->>Browser: "No information available" Browser-->>User: "Ich finde dazu keine ausreichenden Informationen." end

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个完整的用户旅程图，展示从搜索艺术品到使用RAG问答的完整流程。核心参与者包括用户、浏览器、Next.js应用，以及后端的ArtworkAPI、PersonAPI和RAGAPI这几个服务。
明白了。RAG流程看起来比较复杂，我需要确认一下：RAGAPI后面是不是还有RAGService、Elasticsearch和OpenAI这几个组件？另外SolrClient是不是同时被ArtworkAPI和PersonAPI共用？
对的，SolrClient是共享的搜索客户端。RAG链路确实更长：RAGAPI调用RAGService，RAGService会并行做向量搜索（走Elasticsearch的KNN）和词法搜索（BM25），最后调用OpenAI生成答案。另外还需要MongoDB来存对话历史。
好的，我先画出主干架构。从用户打开首页开始：用户通过浏览器访问/de或/en路径，Next.js渲染首页带hero区域。然后用户搜索"impressionist"，请求走到ArtworkAPI，SolrClient构建查询参数，搜索collection.kunsthaus.ch，返回12条结果和聚合面。
接下来要展示筛选流程。用户在结果页选择"Painting"分类，ArtworkAPI会重新查询，这次带上categories:["Painting"]参数。然后用户点击《向日葵》进入详情页，URL是/de/artworks/123，这里要加载IIIF viewer显示高清图。
收到，详情页调用getArtworkById("123")。接下来是艺术家关联：用户点击"Van Gogh"跳转到/de/persons/456，走PersonAPI查询艺术家生平和其他作品。这个跳转要清晰展示出来。
现在进入核心RAG场景。用户在《向日葵》详情页提问"What technique did Van Gogh use?"，这是个POST请求，端点是/api/de/rag/answer/artwork/123，请求体里要带上当前艺术品上下文currentArtwork。
elements_involved: What technique did Van Gogh use?

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我正在画RAG内部流程。RAGService收到请求后，先做查询增强和语言检测（德语），然后调用OpenAI生成embedding。接下来并行两路：一路走Elasticsearch做KNN向量搜索，另一路做BM25词法搜索，最后合并结果选上下文，再调OpenAI生成带引用的答案。
这里有个细节：答案要显示德语回复"Van Gogh verwendete Ölmalerei-Technik"，并且带引用标记[1][2]。然后用户追问"When was it painted?"，这时候请求体里要包含history数组，RAGService需要处理对话历史。
明白了，追问流程重用同一端点，但带上history。答案要体现上下文连续性："Das Gemälde wurde 1888 gemalt"，引用[3]。最后用户点击"查看Van Gogh所有作品"，跳转到艺术家作品列表，用artistId: 456查询。
还需要加上错误处理分支。搜索失败时SolrClient返回错误，ArtworkAPI抛500，前端显示"Search temporarily unavailable"。RAG找不到上下文时，要显示德语提示"Ich finde dazu keine ausreichenden Informationen."。
elements_involved: Ich finde dazu keine ausreichenden Informationen

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 已经加上两个alt错误分支。我注意到整个旅程有个总标题"User Journey: Search → Browse → Detail → Related → Chat"，用Note覆盖所有参与者。检查一下：从首页→搜索→筛选→详情→艺术家→RAG问答→追问→浏览相关作品，完整闭环。
等等，RAG流程里MongoDB的作用需要明确。它是用来存储对话历史的，但图上Note已经覆盖了Mongo，这个Note其实是总标题，不是数据流。MongoDB在追问时读取history，但不需要画显式连线，保持简洁。
收到，我调整一下。之前我误以为MongoDB需要显式连线，实际上history作为参数传递即可，MongoDB在背景中支持。RAGService的answerRag方法签名是({q, lang: "de", currentArtwork: {...}})和({q, lang: "de", history: [...]})，这样更准确。
对的。另外确认下并行搜索的表示：par Vector Search / and Lexical Search / end 这个结构要保留，体现KNN和BM25同时执行。所有API端点的语言参数都是de，保持一致。
全部完成。最终检查：用户旅程覆盖8个主要步骤，包含完整的搜索参数（q=impressionist&pageSize=12）、分类过滤、艺术品ID 123、艺术家ID 456、RAG双路检索、对话历史追踪，以及两种错误场景的降级处理。
